ogTitle: Kwinana Beach vs Kwolyin: Climate Safety

heading: Kwinana Beach vs Kwolyin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kwinana Beach, Western Australia and Kwolyin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kwolyin has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Kwinana Beach (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kwinana Beach or Kwolyin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kwinana Beach has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Kwolyin scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kwinana Beach scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Kwolyin scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kwinana Beach or Kwolyin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kwolyin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
